workload.system_prompt: You are a test agent. You have access to search tools. Always use a tool when asked.
workload.user_message: Use tool_00_search to look up 'hello'. Return the tool name you used.

notes: Mode B: real Anthropic API call. Single tool (tool_00_search). Latency = wall-clock time for messages.create() to return. Network RTT included.
